payload.answer: I’m not sure what “the thing from yesterday” refers to. Please provide the specific detail you want remembered, or identify the prior item if you’re referring to an existing memory.
repair_options: Clarify the specific fact or preference you want remembered.
Specify which prior memory or conversation item from yesterday you mean.
If this is an update to an existing memory, state what should change.
If this is a new standalone memory, provide the exact information to store.
